heading: Repealed. , ,Pub. L. 98–242, title I, § 110(a)98 Stat. 101Mar. 22, 1984
label: 7871 to 7883 Repealed. , ,Pub. L. 98–242, title I, § 110(a)98 Stat. 101Mar. 22, 1984
notes: Section 7871, , , , enumerated powers of Secretary of the Interior in carrying out this chapter.Pub. L. 95–467, title IV, § 40092 Stat. 1313Oct. 17, 1978

Section 7872, , , ; , §§ 1, 2(a), , , authorized appropriation of funds for programs under sections 7811(a) and (c), 7815(a) and (b), and 7819 of this title.Pub. L. 95–467, title IV, § 40192 Stat. 1313Pub. L. 96–45794 Stat. 2032Oct. 17, 1978Oct. 15, 1980

Section 7873, , , ; , , , authorized appropriation of funds for research, development, and demonstration plants.Pub. L. 95–467, title IV, § 40292 Stat. 1314Pub. L. 96–457, § 2(b)(1)94 Stat. 2032Oct. 17, 1978Oct. 15, 1980

Section 7874, , , ; , , , authorized appropriation of funds for programs conducted under this chapter for which there were no specific appropriations.Pub. L. 95–467, title IV, § 40392 Stat. 1314Pub. L. 96–457, § 2(b)(2)94 Stat. 2032Oct. 17, 1978Oct. 15, 1980
Section 7875, , , , related to grant applications, approval of applications by the Secretary, and the basis of approvals.Pub. L. 95–467, title IV, § 40492 Stat. 1314Oct. 17, 1978
Section 7876, , , , related to payments to institutes and accounting for such payments.Pub. L. 95–467, title IV, § 40592 Stat. 1315Oct. 17, 1978

Section 7877, , , , related to cooperation in research programs between Federal agencies, State and local governments, private institutions, and individuals.Pub. L. 95–467, title IV, § 40692 Stat. 1315Oct. 17, 1978

Section 7878, , , , authorized conveyance of property acquired by the Secretary to a cooperating institute, educational institution, or cooperating nonprofit organization, and empowered the Secretary to dispose of water and byproducts resulting from operations under this chapter.Pub. L. 95–467, title IV, § 40792 Stat. 1316Oct. 17, 1978
Section 7879, , , , set out policy under this chapter with regard to patents.Pub. L. 95–467, title IV, § 40892 Stat. 1316Oct. 17, 1978
Section 7880, , , , provided for annual reports to the Secretary by various water research institutes.Pub. L. 95–467, title IV, § 40992 Stat. 1316Oct. 17, 1978

Section 7881, , , , provided that the chapter was not intended to repeal, supersede, or diminish existing authorities of agencies concerning water resources, or to be construed to alter existing law with respect to ownership and control of water.Pub. L. 95–467, title IV, § 41092 Stat. 1316Oct. 17, 1978

Section 7882, , , , , , , provided for transmittal of rules, regulations, etc., to the Speaker of the House and President of the Senate.Pub. L. 95–467, title IV, § 41192 Stat. 1317Pub. L. 96–457, § 2(b)(3)94 Stat. 2032Oct. 17, 1978Oct. 15, 1980

Section 7883, , , , provided that authority to enter into contracts or cooperative agreements and to make payments under this chapter was effective only to the extent or in such amounts as were provided in advance in appropriations acts.Pub. L. 95–467, title IV, § 41292 Stat. 1317Oct. 17, 1978
For prior provisions, see .section 10301 of this title

Limitations on Authorization of Appropriations for Fiscal Years 1982 to 1984, , , provided that no funds were authorized to be appropriated to the Secretary of the Interior for the purposes of water resources research and development, saline water research, development, and demonstration, and associated activities in excess of $23,650,000 per fiscal year for each of the fiscal years ending , , and .Pub.
